name: Spermidine vaccine-response older-adult pilot
summary: A double-blind randomized placebo-controlled pilot study of oral spermidine after a third SARS-CoV-2 vaccine dose in healthy adults aged 65 to 90 years.
population: Healthy adults aged 65 to 90 years after a third SARS-CoV-2 vaccine dose

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are now in the public evidence layer through PMID 42169618; the ClinicalTrials.gov record still had no posted results module in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Autophagy Induction because they test whether spermidine can move older-adult immune response, immune-senescence markers, and autophagy-related B-cell signals. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
